---
title: "Aim 1: Associations"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

# Load packages and data
```{r setting}
library(broom)
library(car)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

apoe_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, "PREVENTAD_apoe_filtered.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers_filtered.rds"))
clinical <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, "PREVENTAD_clinical_imp_filtered_raw.rds"))
cogd_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_cogd_scored_dat.rds"))
diagnosis <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_diagnosis.rds"))
fhx <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                         "PREVENTAD_fhx_filtered.rds"))
grs <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_GRS.rds"))
libra_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$cleaned, "PREVENTAD_libra_scored_dat.rds"))

# Predictors dataset
predictors_dat <- grs %>%
  left_join((clinical %>%
               select(CONP_ID, Candidate_Age, Sex, Weight, Height) %>%
               mutate(Candidate_Age = Candidate_Age/12,
                      BMI = Weight/(Height/100)^2) %>%
               rename(age = Candidate_Age,
                      sex = Sex) %>%
               select(-Weight, -Height)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(apoe_dat, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((cogd_dat %>% 
               select(CONP_ID, score_cogd)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(fhx, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((libra_dat %>% 
               select(CONP_ID, score_libra2)),
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  select(CONP_ID, age, sex, BMI, apoe, 
         score_cogd, GRS, score_libra2, family_history)

saveRDS(predictors_dat, file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
```


# Get last measured biomarkers
```{r}
ptau217_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ptau217)) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Date_taken, age, ptau217) %>%
  slice_tail() 

other_biomarkers_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(BIOMARKERS)) %>%
  select(-ptau217) %>%
  filter_at(vars(-CONP_ID), all_vars(!is.na(.))) %>%
  slice_tail() 

all_dat <- predictors_dat %>% 
  left_join((ptau217_last %>%
               select(CONP_ID, ptau217)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(other_biomarkers_last, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  column_to_rownames(var="CONP_ID")

max_gfap <- max(all_dat$gfap)

all_dat_longer <- all_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = BIOMARKERS,
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) %>%
  # mutate(measure_norm = if_else(biomarker == "ab_ratio", measure, log(measure)))
  mutate(measure_norm = case_when(
    biomarker == "ab_ratio" ~ measure,
    #biomarker == "gfap" ~ sqrt(measure),
    #
    biomarker == "ptau231" ~ sqrt(measure),
    #biomarker == "ptau217" ~ sign(measure) * abs(measure)^(1/3),
    #biomarker != "ab_ratio" | biomarker != "ptau231" ~ ,
    TRUE ~ log(measure)))

ggplot(aes(x = measure_norm), data=all_dat_longer) +
  geom_density() +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free")

ggplot(aes(x = GRS), data=all_dat) +
  geom_density()

df1 <- predictors_dat %>%
  left_join(diagnosis, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Clinical_diagnosis, y=GRS, fill=Clinical_diagnosis)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  #facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")
df1


ggplot(aes(x = GRS), data=all_dat) +
  geom_density()

```

```{r}
test_df <- all_dat_longer %>% filter(biomarker == "gfap")
shapiro.test(log(all_dat$GRS))
```

# CRS
```{r}
dat1 <- predictors_dat %>%
  left_join(diagnosis, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(Clinical_diagnosis = as.factor(Clinical_diagnosis))
model1 <- lm(GRS ~ age + sex + apoe + Clinical_diagnosis, data=dat1)
summ(model1)
plot(model1)

ggplot(dat1, aes(x=Clinical_diagnosis, y=GRS)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method="lm")
```

# Predictor associations with biomarker levels (last visit)
```{r}
# Continuous
plot1 <- all_dat_longer %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score_libra2, y = measure_norm)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1, na.rm=TRUE) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.5, na.rm=TRUE) +
  stat_cor(label.x.npc=0.6,
           label.y.npc=0.2,
           size=2.75,
           geom = "label",
           #position="jitter",
           color="red",
           label.sep = "\n",
           na.rm=TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~biomarker, scales="free") + 
  labs(x = "LIBRA2",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "LIBRA2 and AD Blood-based Biomarker Levels in PREVENT-AD",
       subtitle = "Biomarker level taken at last visit") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") 
plot1
ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_LIBRA2_vs_BBM.png"), plot1)

# Discrete
plot2 <- all_dat_longer %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=apoe, y=measure_norm, fill=apoe)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ biomarker, scales="free") +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  
                     label.y.npc = 0.9,
                     geom = "label",
                     #fill = "white",
                     size=3) +
  labs(x = "APOE",
       y = "Biomarker Level (pg/mL or AB ratio)",
       title = "Biomarker Levels by APOE Status in PREVENT-AD",
       subtitle = "Biomarker level taken at last visit") +
  theme(legend.position="none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))
plot2
ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_apoe_vs_BBM.png"), plot2)
```
